title: poa confinis
intro: Poa confinis, also known as Poa confinis or Mountain Bluegrass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa confinis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and support immune function. Poa confinis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
